span.p: Last item omits routePath\n(it's the current page — non-link).

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
RouteMetadata.pageHeader carries this
as Route.data for the orchestrator.
Pages can also push dynamically via
PageHeaderService.set().

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: actionKey emitted via (action) — host\npages own the side-effect; the\npage-header is dumb chrome.
